Volatility 3
Upstream: https://github.com/volatilityfoundation/volatility3
License: Volatility Software License (VSL) Version 1.0
License text: https://github.com/volatilityfoundation/volatility3/blob/develop/LICENSE.txt

Volatility 3 is an OPTIONAL worker component. It is installed only when the
worker image is built with INSTALL_OPEN_FORENSICS=true and INSTALL_VOLATILITY3=true
(see scripts/install-open-forensics.sh). It is pip-installed at build time and is
not redistributed in this source repository.

Before redistributing a worker IMAGE that includes Volatility 3, copy the
upstream VSL-1.0 LICENSE.txt into this directory and verify compliance with its
terms (notably the non-commercial-derivative and attribution provisions).
